content_body: This week has gone by so fast-this was our 2nd time at Blue Ridge, and it has become our vacation spot of choice. Last time we came it was in January, and the winter was beautiful; however, in the summertime there is so much more to do. Our favorite lunch spot is the L&L Beanery located downtown in the business district. Try their tomato Basil Soup - it's amazing. We went gem mining at a few locations, found some rubies and sapphires. We also went tubing down the Toccoa River, where we just dodged a thunderstorm that day and had beautiful sun. The tubing lasted about 1.5 hours. On our last day when we had beautiful weather in the 80's, we rented a boat on Lake Blue Ridge and pulled a tube on the back while hitting some big waves! A perfect day to eat lunch on a boat and soak up the sun like we do in South Florida. Great week and Thank you for everything. See you again in a few months!
title: Adventures at Outlaw Ridge
